# RoutifyAPI 服务公告 **重要通知：RoutifyAPI 服务范围** 尊敬的用户： 感谢您选择 RoutifyAPI。为明确我们的服务范围和合规要求，特此公告如下： --- ## 1. 地理服务限制 **RoutifyAPI 不在中国大陆提供服务。** - 本服务仅面向中国大陆以外的地区和用户 - 中国大陆用户不得注册或使用 RoutifyAPI 服务 - 我们的服务器和数据中心不位于中国大陆 - 所有业务运营和数据处理均在中国大陆以外进行 ## 2. 用户责任 **RoutifyAPI 服务用户必
visibleText: Routify 首页 控制台 模型广场 登录 用户协议 # RoutifyAPI 服务公告 **重要通知：RoutifyAPI 服务范围** 尊敬的用户： 感谢您选择 RoutifyAPI。为明确我们的服务范围和合规要求，特此公告如下： --- ## 1. 地理服务限制 **RoutifyAPI 不在中国大陆提供服务。** - 本服务仅面向中国大陆以外的地区和用户 - 中国大陆用户不得注册或使用 RoutifyAPI 服务 - 我们的服务器和数据中心不位于中国大陆 - 所有业务运营和数据处理均在中国大陆以外进行 ## 2. 用户责任 **RoutifyAPI 服务用户必须：** - **确认位置：** 注册时确认您不在中国大陆 - **遵守当地法律：** 遵守您所在司法管辖区的法律法规 - **提供准确信息：** 提供真实有效的注册信息 - **禁止代理访问：** 不得使用 VPN、代理或其他技术手段从中国大陆访问 ## 3. 平台权利 **为确保合规运营，RoutifyAPI 保留以下权利：** - **位置验证：** 通过 IP 地址、支付信息等方式验证用户位置 - **拒绝服务：** 拒绝或终止来自中国大陆的访问和服务 - **账户管理：** 对违规账户采取限制、暂停或终止等措施 - **不予退款：** 因违反地理限制而终止服务的用户不予退款 ## 4. 服务特点 **RoutifyAPI 提供：** - **多模型支持：** GPT、Claude 等主流 AI 模型的 API 接口 - **多种渠道：** 官方渠道和逆向渠道可选 - **灵活计费：** 按量付费，提供多种团购价格选项 - **可靠服务：** 7×24 小时服务保障 ## 5. 价格信息 - **预付费模式：** 用户需先充值后使用 - **按量计费：** 根据实际 API 调用量收费 - **差异化定价：** 不同模型和渠道价格不同 - **不可退款：** 充值金额不可退款，请谨慎充值 - **非人民币结算：** 所有交易以美元或其他非人民币货币结算 ## 6. 合规承诺 **RoutifyAPI 承诺：** - **数据安全：** 采用加密技术保护用户数据 - **隐私保护：** 严格遵守 GDPR、CCPA 等国际数据保护法规 - **透明运营：** 价格和政策变更提前通知 - **合法合规：** 遵守平台注册地司法管辖区的法律法规 ## 7. 违规处理 **对于违反服务范围限制的行为，我们将：** - 立即终止服务 - 冻结账户 - 不退还剩余余额 - 保留追究法律责任的权利 ## 8. 免责声明 - 用户对使用 API 生成的内容承担全部责任 - 用户对违反当地法律的行为承担法律责任 - RoutifyAPI 不对因用户违规造成的任何损失承担责任 - RoutifyAPI 不对第三方 API 服务的可用性和稳定性负责 ## 9. 联系方式 如有疑问，请通过以下方式联系我们： - **邮箱：** 2926957031@qq.com ## 10. 生效日期 本公告自发布之日起生效。继续使用 RoutifyAPI 服务即表示您已阅读、理解并同意本公告的所有内容。 --- **特别提醒：** - 注册前请仔细阅读本公告、用户协议和隐私政策 - 注册即表示您确认不在中国大陆，并同意遵守所有服务条款 - 我们保留随时修改本公告的权利，变更内容将在平台上发布 感谢您的理解与配合！ **最后更新：2026年** **RoutifyAPI 运营团队** --- --- # RoutifyAPI ## Service Announcement **Important Notice: RoutifyAPI Service Coverage** Dear Users, Thank you for choosing RoutifyAPI. To clarify our service scope and compliance requirements, we hereby announce the following: --- ## 1. Geographic Service Restrictions **RoutifyAPI does not provide services in Mainland China.** - This service is only available to regions and users outside Mainland China - Users in Mainland China are not permitted to register or use RoutifyAPI services - Our servers and data centers are not located in Mainland China - All business operations and data processing are conducted outside Mainland China ## 2. User Responsibilities **Users of RoutifyAPI services must:** - **Confirm Location:** Confirm upon registration that you are not located in Mainland China - **Comply with Local Laws:** Adhere to the laws and regulations of your jurisdiction - **Provide Accurate Information:** Provide truthful and valid registration information - **No Proxy Access:** Do not use VPN, proxy, or other technical means to access from Mainland China ## 3. Platform Rights **To ensure compliant operations, RoutifyAPI reserves the following rights:** - **Location Verification:** Verify user location through IP address, payment information, and other means - **Service Denial:** Refuse or terminate access and services from Mainland China - **Account Management:** Take measures including restriction, suspension, or termination for violating accounts - **No Refunds:** No refunds will be issued when terminating services for users violating geographic restrictions ## 4. Service Features **RoutifyAPI provides:** - **Multi-Model Support:** API interfaces for mainstream AI models including GPT, Claude, and more - **Multiple Channels:** Official channels and reverse channels available - **Flexible Billing:** Pay-as-you-go pricing with various group rate options - **Reliable Service:** 7×24 hour service guarantee ## 5. Pricing Information - **Prepaid Model:** Users must recharge before use - **Usage-Based Billing:** Charges based on actual API call volume - **Differentiated Pricing:** Different prices for different models and channels - **Non-Refundable:** Recharged amounts are non-refundable, please recharge carefully - **Non-RMB Settlement:** All transactions are settled in USD or other non-RMB currencies ## 6. Compliance Commitment **RoutifyAPI commits to:** - **Data Security:** Employ encryption technology to protect user data - **Privacy Protection:** Strictly comply with international data protection regulations such as GDPR and CCPA - **Transparent Operations:** Advance notice of price and policy changes - **Legal Compliance:** Comply with laws and regulations of the platform's registration jurisdiction ## 7. Violation Handling **For violations of service scope restrictions, we will:** - Immediately terminate service - Freeze account - Not refund remaining balance - Reserve the right to pursue legal liability ## 8. Disclaimer - Users bear full responsibility for content generated using the API - Users bear legal responsibility for violations of local laws - RoutifyAPI is not liable for any losses resulting from user violations - RoutifyAPI is not responsible for the availability and stability of third-party API services ## 9. Contact Information For inquiries, please contact us through: - **Email:** 2926957031@qq.com ## 10. Effective Date This announcement takes effect from the date of publication. Continued use of RoutifyAPI services indicates that you have read, understood, and agreed to all contents of this announcement. --- **Special Reminders:** - Please carefully read this announcement, User Agreement, and Privacy Policy before registration - Registration indicates that you confirm you are not located in Mainland China and agree to comply with all service terms - We reserve the right to modify this announcement at any time, with changes to be published on the platform Thank you for your understanding and cooperation! **Last Updated: 2026** **RoutifyAPI Operations Team** Routify 原生体验，远低于官方的价格。一个入口，稳定连通每一个模型。 产品 控制台 模型广场 API Keys 文档 法律 用户协议 隐私政策 © 2026 Routify. 版权所有 基于 New API
